source_intake_record.raw_question_text: According to the figure, it is a schematic diagram of the pinhole imaging principle in physics. Given that the object $AB=30$, based on the dimensions in the figure $(AB\parallel CD)$, what should be the length of $CD$?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text:
Solution: According to the problem, $\triangle ODC \sim \triangle OAB$\\
$\therefore \frac{AB}{CD} = \frac{36}{12}$\\
$\because AB = 30$\\
$\therefore CD = \frac{1}{3} \times 30 = \boxed{10}$
